data.title: Bitcoin ETFs Saw $457 Million Net Outflows Last Week, Ethereum ETFs Recorded $634 Million Net Inflows
data.description: Digital asset investment products saw inflows of $270 million last week, setting a new year-to-date record of $37.3 billion, according to a CoinShares report.
